Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__baseline", sum(CASE WHEN (up.applicability = true) THEN up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" ELSE bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" END * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__upgrade", sum((coalesce(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", 0) - coalesce(CASE WHEN (up.applicability = true) THEN up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" ELSE bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" END, 0)) * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__savings", sum(bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh__baseline", sum(CASE WHEN (up.applicability = true) THEN up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" ELSE bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" END * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh__upgrade", sum((coalesce(bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh", 0) - coalesce(CASE WHEN (up.applicability = true) THEN up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" ELSE bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" END, 0)) * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh__savings" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs LEFT OUTER JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" = up."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" AND bs.state = up.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.upgrade = 1 AND up.applicability = true 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state IN ('CO', 'NM') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/08ea4e3ac9e3391e3d2307a5b870d56f00b05bc5eb2691b150e4afb0bce76dfd/e2d68b63-5b30-4a7b-bb35-f469cb5233f4/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
